Delicacies

Savor the unique flavors and culinary heritage of the island.

Taste Now

Kinilaw

A local favorite, this dish features fresh raw fish marinated in vinegar, ginger, onions, and chili peppers. It’s a refreshing and tangy treat that perfectly captures the island's fresh seafood bounty.

Cassava Cake

A sweet and chewy dessert made from grated cassava, coconut milk, and sugar. It’s often topped with a creamy custard layer and baked until golden brown. A perfect treat to satisfy your sweet tooth.

Dudol

A sweet and chewy dessert made from grated cassava, coconut milk, and sugar. It’s often topped with a creamy custard layer and baked until golden brown. A perfect treat to satisfy your sweet tooth.
